_note: Abraham's firstborn Ishmael, by Hagar (Genesis 16, 21, 25) — the parallel to the Isaac->Jacob/Esau fork. Scripture names Ishmael's twelve sons, the 'twelve princes' of Genesis 25:13-16 (Gen 17:20). Every name from the text. Ishmael's line hangs off Abraham (who is in the tree) and does not force any connection downward — the traditional Nabataean=Nebaioth link to Herod's mother is left out unless requested, since (unlike Esau=Edom, which scripture states outright) it is a debated identification. Sorts after 07_biblical so Abraham already exists.
